title: FBI-UAP-PR005, Digital Recreation, Narrative Statement 3-1, Western United States Event, 2023
summary: This video is an artistic interpretation of a reported incident near a sensitive national security site in the western United States involving unidentified anomalous phenomena (UAP) over a period of two days in October 2023. This digital recreation is based upon a first-hand description provided by a federal law enforcement special agent, as described in DOW-UAP-D081. The Federal Bureau of Investigation prepared this digital recreation at the request of the Department of War in 2026
csv_raw_title: FBI-UAP-PR005, Digital Recreation, Narrative Statement 3-1, Western United States Event, 2023

audience.tldr: FBI investigative document from a Bureau case file showing footage of a UAP encounter (October, 2023) over Western United States.
what_we_dont: No kinematic data (speed, altitude, maneuver) is attached.
No official conclusion has been issued classifying the object as conventional.
Independent corroboration from non-government sources has not been confirmed.
audience.mundane_candidate: A conventional explanation is technically possible but has not been demonstrated.
audience.score_sentence: Anomalousness Index 70/100. Top drivers: sensor quality (single_sensor_military), witness credibility (federal_agent).
